summary: Iteration 38: Phase 4 QA - New Features Verified. All 18 backend tests passed. All new features working: Login returns 3 token aliases (session_token, token, access_token), Platform Admin dashboard shows 5 churches/59,700 members/$7K MRR/$84K ARR, Organizations tab shows Abundant Church with 3 campuses, Campus Comparison view with bar charts and efficiency metrics, Health banner shows 'All Systems Operational', Cafe/Merch giving nudges with preset amounts work correctly, All bug fixes verified (Kids checkin, Geofence, My Groups).

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings during initial render - cosmetic only
Span inside tbody/select warnings - dev mode only, no visual impact

login_token_aliases.verified: Returns session_token, token, and access_token (all same value)

verified: Bar chart comparison shows Total Members by campus
Efficiency metrics: engagement_rate, attendance_rate, giving_per_capita, recurring_rate, members_per_group

bug_a_kids_checkins_today.verified: Returns checked-in children with pickup codes

bug_c_my_groups.verified: Returns 3 groups: Saturday Service Team, Parents of Teens, Tuesday Night Worship

verified: While You're Here section in cart
Offering amount added to cart total
Add a Gift with Your Purchase section
Offering amount added to cart total

checkout_with_giving_endpoint.verified: Combined order + donation creates both order and donation records

verified: Cristo Viene member sees only their church data
Cristo Viene sees their 1,200 members (not Abundant's 50K)

critical_code_review_comments: All token aliases (session_token, token, access_token) return the same value - good for compatibility
Platform MRR/ARR calculated correctly from tenant subscriptions
Campus comparison efficiently uses dashboard_stats_cache collection
Giving nudge integrated seamlessly into cafe/merch checkout flows
Console warnings about Recharts dimensions are cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created this iteration - using Phase 3 data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working: Platform admin MRR/ARR dashboard, Organizations tab with 3 Abundant campuses, Campus comparison with charts and efficiency metrics, Health banner, Giving nudge in Cafe/Merch, All 3 bug fixes verified. The app is production-ready with all multi-tenant SaaS features working correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All authentication, dashboard, platform admin, portal, kids checkin, geofence, groups, cafe, merch endpoints use real MongoDB data
